name: Synthetic Patient (demo only — not real PHI)

facts.subject: allergy
facts.text: On 2026-01-10, patient P001 was diagnosed with a penicillin allergy by Dr. Adams.

facts.text: On 2026-02-15, patient P001 was prescribed lisinopril 10mg for hypertension.

facts.subject: allergy
facts.text: On 2026-03-02, patient P001's penicillin allergy was cleared after a negative re-test by Dr. Lee.

facts.subject: medication
facts.text: On 2026-04-20, patient P001 stopped lisinopril and switched to amlodipine 5mg.

facts.subject: diagnosis
facts.text: On 2026-05-11, patient P001 was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes by Dr. Patel.
